# Coach-QB Tenure Experiment

*Tests whether games-together between QB and coach adds predictive signal.*

Test date: 2026-06-25

## Results

| Model | Avg Val LL | Fold1 | Fold2 | Fold3 | Holdout LL |
|-------|-----------|-------|-------|-------|-----------|
| Platt (incumbent) | 0.6334 | 0.6413 | 0.6573 | 0.6016 | 0.6262 |
| Incumbent + tenure | 0.6374 | 0.6585 | 0.6589 | 0.5948 | 0.6303 |
| Tenure only | 0.6377 | 0.6532 | 0.6641 | 0.5958 | 0.6280 |

## Promotion Check

| Incumbent + tenure | val 0.6374 (✗) | hold 0.6303 (✗) | Rejected |

*Report generated by `sportslab coach-qb-tenure`. Incumbent holdout: 0.6262.*
